# Hot Sonia — Escorts in Patna

> Hot Sonia is Patna's #1 premium escort and call girl service. We offer verified, beautiful female companions for in-call, out-call, and overnight bookings across Patna and surrounding areas in Bihar, India. Available 24/7. 100% discreet, safe, and confidential. Call or WhatsApp: +91 9229604907.

## Core Pages

- [Home](https://hotsonia.in): Homepage with full companion gallery, services overview, why choose us, FAQs, and booking CTA. Primary landing page for escorts in Patna and call girls in Patna.
- [Gallery](https://hotsonia.in/gallery): Photo gallery of all verified companions — Sonia, Priya, Anaya, Natasha, Diya, Neelima, Aafrin, Jamila, Janu, Neethu, Poonam, Sufia, and more.
- [Services](https://hotsonia.in/services): Detailed escort service packages — In-Call, Out-Call, Overnight, GFE (Girlfriend Experience), Hotel Escort, Doorstep Delivery.
- [About](https://hotsonia.in/about): About Hot Sonia — Patna's most trusted escort agency since 2015. Verified companions, discrete service, 24/7 availability.
- [Contact](https://hotsonia.in/contact): Book now via phone or WhatsApp at +91 9229604907. Address: Patna, Bihar 800001, India.
